steps.title: Find the lowest data point among the answer choices
steps.content:
The answer choices are 2012, 2013, 2014, and 2015 — so compare only those four years on the line graph.

Among those four years, the data point at 2014 sits at the lowest position on the graph — it is the chart's overall minimum, visibly lower than the points for 2012, 2013, and 2015.

Therefore, 2014 has the smallest percent. That matches choice C — C is correct.
